<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Enable or disable QA checks for the project"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/qa-settings/enabled"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>
